prompt: Create a realistic cinematic portrait of an elegant young woman with long silky chestnut-brown hair, standing on a luxurious stone terrace at a historic European villa during golden hour. She wears a soft beige embroidered traditional dress with delicate pink floral details, lace-trimmed sleeves, and a sheer matching dupatta draped over one shoulder. Her left hand rests gently on a carved stone balustrade while she faces the camera in a relaxed three-quarter pose; her face is covered by a plain soft-edged rectangular skin-tone privacy blur centered over the facial area. The setting includes an old stone building with an arched doorway on the right, cobblestone paving, carved terrace railings, tall dark green cypress trees, terracotta pots filled with vibrant pink flowers, and a distant countryside view framed by a stone archway in the background. Use warm golden sunlight, natural highlights in the hair, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, romantic Mediterranean villa atmosphere, high-resolution photorealism, refined natural beauty, and a softly blurred background. Keep the composition vertical portrait, waist-up framing, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
